rule_metadata.name: findpos
rule_metadata.description: FindPOS is a newly discovered POS family.
rule_metadata.author: Josh Grunzweig

rules.rule_text:
import "cuckoo"

rule findpos
{
	meta:
		description = "FindPOS is a newly discovered POS family."
		category = "Point of Sale"
		author = "Josh Grunzweig"

	strings:
		$s1 = "oprat=2&uid=%I64u&uinfo=%s&win=%d.%d&vers=%s" nocase wide ascii
		$pdb1 = "H:\\Work\\Current\\FindStr\\Release\\FindStr.pdb" nocase wide ascii
		$pdb2 = "H:\\Work\\FindStrX\\Release\\FindStr.pdb" nocase wide ascii
		$pdb3 = "H:\\Work\\Current\\KeyLogger\\Release\\KeyLogger.pdb" nocase wide ascii

	condition:
		any of ( $s* ) or any of ( $pdb* ) or ( cuckoo.sync.mutex ( /WIN_[a-fA-F0-9]{16}/ ) and cuckoo.registry.key_access ( /\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Run/ ) and ( cuckoo.filesystem.file_access ( /C\:\\WINDOWS\\System32\\\w{8}\.exe/ ) or cuckoo.filesystem.file_access ( /C\:\\Documents\ and\ Settings\\[^\\]+\\\w{8}\.exe/ ) ) )
}
